channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: The US national debt is now bigger than the entire US economy Today's debt milestone is not borne from war mobilization. — 77 replies — 308.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
The US national debt is now bigger than the entire US economy Today's debt milestone is not borne from war mobilization.

Open thread • Replies: 77 • Updated: 2026-05-07 07:20 UTC

OP

The US national debt is now bigger than the entire US economy
Today's debt milestone is not borne from war mobilization. It is the accumulated result of tax cuts without matching reductions in spending, an aging population drawing more heavily on Social Security and Medicare, and years of political leadership on both sides of the aisle that has consistently chosen short-term popularity over long-term solvency.
You fags are cooked (including me)

Early replies (first 3)

62179629
Doesn’t matter, because no one can collect from the US Govt

Refute this without sounding mad

62179630
>>62179622
breaking news: voters want stuff and dont want to pay for it

62179853
>>62179622
AI will fix this

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62184058
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aDAL5G9Xwn4&list=RDaDAL5G9Xwn4
https://i.4cdn.org/biz/1777749403133051.png

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4ZHwu0uut3k&list=RD4ZHwu0uut3k
>[720p]
https://i.4cdn.org/biz/1777749468586523.jpg

62184159
>>62179629
Most of the US debt isn't from foriegn countries. It's US themselves. US Pension & retirement funds, US investment firms, US etfs etc. If US defaults you'll see US citizens and companies lose money. Holding US treasuriers aren't going to be worth as much since US isn't going to meet its obligations. Companies and people will lose a lot money. Contraction of the economy will happen for years due to this cycle. You'll also see a stock market crash and the decades of growth will vanish because nobody will want to lend to the US at similar rates. It'll probably be as bad as the great depression if not worse.


Hopefully this happens and I can a US citizen as a slave wagie.

62184174
>>62180399
This is not a survey of people willing to fight for their country; it's a survey of people willing to click "yes" on an internet poll. The reality would be a tiny tiny fraction of that number.

62184182
>>62184174
Dude we literally go to europe and beat the fuck out of your pickpocket niggers and muslims if they fuck with us. Realistically only 5 million Americans would be needed to beat europe down like dogs

62184190
>>62179629
The US depends on people continuing to buy its debt, just to fund ongoing expenses

62184198
>>62180442
>eliminate all taxes for people making less than ~75k a year
Uh, lower taxes won't help the debt.

>block immigration
More people = more tax revenue

62184199
>>62184190
Just like all country?

62184207
>>62184199
There are countries that run small or no deficits and could cope quite well with zero net debt issuance.

62184218
>>62180410
india has like 1.4 billion people the self-hating white obsessed ones you see in the west represent a tiny fraction the actual ones in india are all retarded jingoists or muslims

62184243
>>62184182
That's cute but every single time in the past 30 years that you guys have had an opportunity to show that you're not all talk, you've rolled over like bitches. Off the top of my head:
>allowing cops to go door to door confiscating guns during katrina
>allowing military to go door to door conducting warrantless searches after the boston marathon bombing
>hiding in your house posting on twitter while mobs of leftists took over entire cities while completely crippling police forces and burning down police stations during the george floyd riots
You lives are too comfortable to ever risk them. You have fun larping online but we all know that the only people willing to risk their lives in the real world are those with either strong convictions or little to lose and we both know that you have a lot to lose and don't really believe in anything.

The only time Americans show any balls is when there's a call for people to die for Israel.

62184279
>>62179622
>>62179629
>Doesn’t matter, because no one can collect from the US Govt
>>62179928
>Come and take the debt
funny to see americans think the debt is owed to other countries instead of its own people.

62184305
>>62184279
forgot pic related

62184336
>>62179622
>Cut defense spending
>Cut medicare
>Cut social security
>Tax rich people, tax the middle class, tax the working class, tax the poor, tax your mom. Tax your Grandma. Everyone's getting picked up, flipped over around shaken for money and needs to get over it.
>Inflate the currency
>Keep every other program because those those don't actually matter that much. In fact, add more.
>Ignore culture wars. Ignore culture clowns.
>Pay our doomer, meme-brained, low IQ, lazy and angertainment-addicted public a few pennies to go to the park to end the loneliness epidemic and polarization and just go outside and see how human beings function
>Cut the "muh affordability" meme subsidizes. We're adults. Show them the real bill and just stop it.
>Nuclear, Wind and Solar power. Shut up about the rest.
>Viciously murder zoning, car centricity and nimby laws on public television
Amendment guaranteeing that you have to let people build houses on land they buy provided it's not a safety or environmental hazard.
>Respect law outcomes, but persecute each and every corrupt official no matter what to where you make Watergate look like a peace rally compared it.
>Expose every grifter. They might not be prosecutable, but they will be known.
>Spew TRVTHS daily and nightly no matter who it hurts (including yourself)
There. Fixed your country.

Do you think the average American won't do this because they're afraid won't work or because we are afraid of seeing the infeasibility and sunk cost of the current American lifestyle?

62184343
>>62184207
Such as?

62184400
>>62179629
Eventually the dollar collapses though and bond yields spike because people demand higher and higher interest on what's a collapsing dollar

62187354
>>62184058

https://i.4cdn.org/biz/1777750871226027.jpg
https://cdn.donmai.us/sample/a2/1a/__gunsmith_bitch_panty_stocking_with_garterbelt_drawn_by_sketchinventor__sample-a21abc6dafbdafd9ed6c0893528de850.jpg

62188579
>>62181550
This
>>62179928
>Come and take the debt
You are genuinely retarded. Slavery needs to come back, all races.

62188593
>>62179622
>You fags are cooked (including me)

62188936
>>62184343
Surplus: Norway, Denmark
Minor deficit: Sweden

62192220
>>62188593
Yummy

62193530
>>62179629
Food
>America is food secure
Unti AI agriculture was the most subsidized industry in the country.

62193681
>>62184336
Just re-arrange american healthcare and social security system. Private healthcare and private education are incredibly costly.

62193707
>>62184336
The system more than likely is incapable of being fixed at this point and cutting benefits is political suicide.

62193761
>>62193707
The fix is inflation. They'll keep running it hot to inflate away the debt while forcing bond rates lower artificially.

62194225
>>62179622
Doesn't matter its all fabricated when the fed can print infinitely

62194394
>>62179629
The world stopping to use of the US dollar as the de-facto reserve currency and universal trade tender is not something the US in its current state can survive tho.

Any other country in the world would be facing the greatest hyperinflation event ever seen if they did the shit the US is doing. They're the only things barely preventing it right now.

62194405
>>62184336
you assume things aren't being played out exactly as intended

62197937
>>62179622
me when bi dl trade verbal dom

62200684
>>62179622
>The US national debt is now bigger than the entire US economy

is that bad? Most people have more debt than cash in the bank, not a big deal! Plus, Trump loves debt. Its all part of the plan.

62200692
>>62179928
i'm with this guy. eat shit commies

item.title: The LINK token has value — 103 replies — 149.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
The LINK token has value

Open thread • Replies: 103 • Updated: 2026-05-07 06:51 UTC

OP

The LINK token has value

Early replies (first 3)

62176216
New Chainlink report
https://bitwiseinvestments.com/crypto-market-insights/chainlink-in-plain-english

62176226
>>62176214
>In many cases, nodes must stake LINK before they can provide and be compensated for their services. If they provide incorrect data, they are penalized and lose a portion of the LINK they have staked. This system helps ensure the integrity of Chainlink’s services while also
reducing the free-floating supply of LINK.
Speaking in present tense. I assume this and the and the other clues we've seen in the past couple weeks mean staking imminent?

62176244
>>62176226
What other clues

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62192925
>>62192901
Bad optics of what? Private companies having private company accounting?

>>62192909
There's plenty of proof, lots of cryptos had public DAO votes about Chainlink integration and rates.
Lots of anecdotes from projects themselves too, like Hoskinson saying CLL would charge him an "absurd number" for direct Cardano integration.

Step out of your bubble

62192926
>>62192907
I can assure you most "fudder" are high 6 figs in link.
It's you triple digit baggies thinking you'll buy a lambo soon that are deluded

62192938
>>62192926
lol @ ESL
I can assure you most fuddies are brown niggers that don't hold any LINK

62192940
>>62192925
>lots of cryptos had DAO votes
>zero cryptos mentioned
>lots of anecdotes from projects
>the only anecdote that's been repeated ad nauseam is the known scammer Hoskinson when referring to his vaporware blockchain pet project
the absolute STATE of LINK shills

62192962
>>62192938
Really going to make me dev that crypto ZKP attestation gated signal group to filter out you pot smokers.

62192982
>>62192938
we fuddies are richer than you can even possibly imagine
due to our wealth, we are basically a different species altogether
a super species that can no longer breed with inferiors such as yourself

62192984
>>62192888
>duuuuuuuude everyone else needs to be truthful except us


hey kid, did you notice your cult stopped using the ollll truth>trust after they got called out?

they grifted you, and here you are begging for their approval

THE Cuckolds of crypto

62192988
>>62192925
>duuuuuuuuude one of the top grifters in crypto history charles said my cult was expensive

there you have it folks, irrefutable truth

62193165
>>62192940
>>62192984
>>62192988
I mean you don't have to believe it or look it up even.

62193169
>>62176477
do you have any response to >>62176598 ?
If you don't that proves you are either
A) stupid bot
B) stupid nigerian
C) angry fudder
D) link holder trying desperately to fud others away from the best moonshot there is.
in any case, everyone can just ignore you: )

62193244
>>62192982
nigga no one is breeding with you KEK

>>62192988
or you lul

brownies rekt once again

62193356
>>62176295
Yes anon. One last step. It's always one more thing. Linkies always dangling new carrots to scam new anons. Get fucked, baggie

62195762
>>62193356
hi! stay mad about link, post in link threads too
>>62192854
>where is the proof from all those off-chain payments
"guy just give me the list of private business transactions. you know the ones where chainlink has negotiated price and terms with each private business partner"
You can see that the Chainlink reserve continues to grow, and payment abstraction means link is bought with onchain and offchain payments. To know more, you'll need to search.

62195773
>>62195762
Chainlink understands how privacy is needed for industry, too

62196215
Pretty sad how the LINK shills cling onto their delusion of financial freedom in the year 2017+9

62196318
>>62177980
Its kinda crazy that the whole amount of link left is only worth 2b while ripple dumps this every month lmao

62196466
>>62196318
They should sell it all at once so we can buy the crash and make it during the ensuing bullrun

62199072
>>62192644
Yeah no one has confirmed it
... except the actual parties themselves saying directly in interviews that they're paying for it

kill yourself, subhuman faggot

62199117
>>62195762
I get what you're doing anon, but the responses just seem pointless. I used to get into these "debates" with these types, but you realize these people either hold massive stacks themselves and have a number of reasons they do this, or they're mentally ill, and there's no point because they'll never stop.

Just look at it from an incentive perspective, lets say they don't hold link and they're just trying to have a debate, OK, why waste more time than needed to tell someone they're wrong? They don't do this in xrp threads, or literally anything else on this board. So at that point they're mentally ill and you're wasting your time.

OK, let's say they do hold link. Well, they're either fudding in the 4chan style of "I hate people liking what I like" and trying to gatekeep, in which case they'll never break because this is what people do here. Or they are angry because they bought high and trying to rationalize with themselves why they haven't sold, in which case nothing you say will ease their pain because only the price going up can make them happy.

Nothing about them is good faith, it screams either trolling, mental illness, or bitter resentment, possibly a combination of all 3 in some cases. And at this point, the people who understand link and know what's being built aren't enthused enough to counter this, so unless you want to commit the same sort of negative mental energy, they'll just overwhelm you with quantity over quality.

62199240
>>62199117
>don't argue with holders
>don't argue with non-holders
>just stay in our ebin echo chamber
>let's just XRPmaxx
Interesting

62199263
>fuuuuck every siiiingle stiiiiink

62199326
>>62199117
having fudders in a thread is usually bullish, and I enjoy quickly replying to them!

62199336
>linkie pisses himself
>dude thats gross
>linkie: i won

62199852
>>62184641
their business model is genius. doesnt benefit holders of the funding token at all, but you cant say it its not a brilliant model for CLL profits

62199891
>>62199852
>doesnt benefit holders of the funding token at all
it does, the funding token, LINK, is staked and used as payment for oracle nodes. someone could try to pay nodes to break the network. Without link, the network doesn't have full economic security.
>>62176214
there are more reasons LINK has value that are not listed here

62199896
>>62199891

62199899
>>62199336
You scared of a little bit of pee? The pharma industry has raped your mind to prevent you from drinking the elixer of the gods.

62200039
>>62199240
Nobody's in an echo chamber fuckhead, its a hurtbox, there hasn't been a positive no fud link thread on this board in at least 5 years. I'm just saying most of the people fudding aren't doing it in good faith, they're just bitching for a variety of reasons related to impatience, trolling, and mental illness. Or they're too cowardly to follow their own ambition, sell, and move on with their life. Nobody's shilling you link anon, and based on your posts in this thread you sound deeply unhappy, my advice to you would be to sell and focus on something else, its clear you either need money right away or simply do not believe there's a long term play here.

62200053
>>62200039
we fuddies are the rich chads who are living life to the fullest. i just got back from a WORLD CRUISE dude. what have you been up to?

62200616
>>62200053

item.title: DAMN THOSE ARE NICE CANNONS! — 33 replies — 132.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
DAMN THOSE ARE NICE CANNONS!

Open thread • Replies: 33 • Updated: 2026-05-07 07:21 UTC

OP

>Two new witnesses come forward in case against JP Morgan exec Lorna Hajdani, accused of making her subordinate Chirayu Rana her sex slave.
>One saw the 'naked' manager arrive at Rana's apartment, saying she 'owns Rana'
>Another saw her 'kissing Rana's neck and grabbing him'

Early replies (first 3)

62197226
>>62197194
Ngl those two do look like a freaky couple.

62197235
let's guess the group affiliation of these "witnesses"

62197261
>>62197194
It's only a matter of time before we get messages of her sending nudes to Rana and other "sex slave", and I can't wait

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62197268
>>62197235
My first thought as well
>we're all gonna get so much izzat!

62197312
>>62197194

Why are jeets so retarded? Why can't they make up fake shit without exaggerating so much?

62197382
>>62197194
>One saw the 'naked' manager arrive at Rana's apartment
So he was walking naked on the streets? I'm having hard time understanding this kind of 'english'

62197499
what's up with his eyes

62197550
>>62197235
>>62197268
Pretty sure one of them is literally Rana’s cousin.

62197638
>>62197550
Pretty sure they're all cousins and the family tree is fucking straight

62198077
>>62197194
>apple ipone
>faggot color
Hes cooked

62198105
>>62197312
>>62197382
>>62197499
>>62198077
it's ai you dumbasses.

62198119
>>62198077
Holy shit is vitalik’s dick really that big??

62198131
>>62197235
Believe us saars!

62198170
>>62198105
not what i said, regardless his eyes still fucking look like that

62198307
>>62198170
cope. and learn to spot ai better, or you're going to be in for a real tough time.

62198329
>>62198307
>dodges the point entirely
>cope
Is 'cope' the new retort for
>yes, I'm third world and terminally retarded. Plz do the needful and forget that I can't follow a conversation
?
Because I've been seeing it a LOT lately in that exact context

62198415
>>62198329
i am the only one in this thread that even questioned the op being ai while you fell for it and you're accusing me of being a third world retard lmfao

62198505
>>62197235
Brahmin not lie sir

62198555
>>62198415
>I am da smartestest
So, I'm getting an emphatic yes to my original question.
Whatever internet points you believe to have garnered won't help you read

62198576
>>62198555
so far in your two responses to me you have shown that you have no abstract reasoning ability and are worse at parsing information than an llm from 2 years ago. for that reason i am assuming you're likely also a cheap ai bot and i am done responding to you lol.

62198619
>>62198576
>never make a single claim about the veracity of the pic in op, instead claim the whole thing is likely a scam in my first shitpost
>ACKSHUALLY ITS A SCAM AND IM THE ONLY ONE THAT SEES IT. YOUR ALL A BIG DUMB PLUS BOTS
That's been both of our contributions to this point. The original anon you replied to was asking about his weird ghoulish sanpaku eyes, but you disregarded that info entirely to fabricate your point. I'm glad you won't be responding to this post ;^}

62198793
saaaaaaaaaaar the white womens make us sexslave !!!!!!!!!!

62199066
>>62197261

>>62197194
It’s over

62199106
>>62197194
Im still waiting for those cannons
God please... if you hear me....

62199659
>>62197235
Based

62200102
i'm convinced this whole story is made up by ai to see how easy it is to manipulate the populace

62200124
>>62197235
They both look Italian?

62200178
The real question is whether she was in on it or not and was gonna take a cut of the emotional damage hush money…it’s a twist on the old wild things plot kinda

62200395
>>62197194
>I Love this Timeline
I Love this Timeline
>I Love this Timeline
I Love this timeline

62200424
>Two more witnesses showed up in the JPMorgan sex abuse case in the refiled legal suit by a former JPMorgan Chase banker, Chirayu Rana, against Lorna Hajdini on the Manhattan Supreme Court docket on Monday, May 4.
>The latest filing includes the testimony of a family friend who claims to have witnessed the intoxicated behaviour of Hajdini. This incident reportedly took place in a New York City apartment where Rana was invited for a threesome.
>Rana’s friend stated in the document that he was woken up by Hajdini in the middle of the night. The witness also mentioned that a “completely naked” Hajdini woke him while he was sleeping on the couch.
>She lit a cigarette and asked Rana to “join them” in the bedroom. When Rana refused, Hajdini allegedly told him, “You know I own [redacted], so you better come join.”
>The man further claimed that after she returned to the bedroom, he could hear Rana pleading, “No, no, no, you have to leave. I’m not going to do this. Please stop.”
>Thereafter, Hajdini left the apartment, and a stunned Rana emerged. The witness then claimed that Rana shared how Hajdini had involved him in sexual behaviour on multiple occasions.
>Rana also shared how Hajdini allegedly blackmailed him and put him in trouble if he refused to comply.
>Another witness, possibly the owner of the apartment where the family friend was staying, claimed he saw Hajdini kissing Rana’s neck on the street. This incident was reportedly from the summer of 2024.
>The witness also claimed that in September 2024, she overheard them entering her apartment building when Hajdini said something like, “I own you, Brownie.”

62200431
>>62198105
U gay

62200640
>>62197235
SAR SHE ALSO SUCKED MY BENGAL PENIS ON SEPARATE OCCASION SAR
I am also having the needful sex with white blonde manager look at this video evidence sar ignore brazzers logo sar

62200693
>>62200424
family friend visajeet also saw the bobs and vagene

item.title: No one is talking about how there's no jobs. — 88 replies — 104.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
No one is talking about how there's no jobs.

Open thread • Replies: 88 • Updated: 2026-05-07 06:42 UTC

OP

No one is talking about how there's no jobs. Ive been working for 10 years and never seen the market nearly this fucked up. Every job is fake, they will interview for 3 or 4 rounds and still repost the job next week, after ghosting people of course. People irl are coping so hard. Im back for my masters and not one person has any job or internship in any of my classes this or previous semester except me(and I will get laid off soon). These zoomers are so fucking deluded. They cant get an internship so they say "of well, im just gonna focus on finishing my masters". Is this how THEY are getting away with it? Society has already brainwashed people so badly the people in charge can drink their milkshake and leave them destitute and they wont even notice?

Early replies (first 3)

62184289
>>62184286
skill issue. ggf &c

62184301
>>62184289
All these interviews just happened to not like me or anyone else they interviewed and reposted the job? What a coincidence. Crazy how i had skills for the past 10 years and always instantly found a job but something randomly happened and now I lost whatever skills I have as I got good excperince in my fields

62184315
>>62184301
Oh and here is the email from my on-site interview on may 4th i got on friday. Nevermind it was my drram company and this tore my fucking hear out. Skill issue on my part that they canceled the role..

Oh and this is only 2/3 of all my interviews this past months if u count phone calls

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62188279
>>62186790
if the governments of the world totally shut off immigration to suit this reality, i'd not be concerned, the problem is they want to import an endless legion of turd world subhumans into the west at the same time as there's no real jobs left for the citizens. Whilst promoting their globohomo bloodsports in Ukraine and the ME.

>come white man, enlist! we only let you get the gig when we need goyim to die for lsraeI! heres you're chance!

62188591
>>62184289
>skill issue.
reddit post.

62188606
>>62184286
>they will interview for 3 or 4 rounds
By the way, they totally could figure it out in one interview. But they string you along for 3+ interviews because they think it's funny.

62188643
>>62184286
Just learn to prompt

62188765
>>62184556
>Reality is an IQ test, what do you think your IQ is?
So my boss must be smarter than me...that's why im retiring in 3 years and that fucker will be slaving until 80

62188796
>>62186790
Which is why those ideologies are either dumb or evil tempting.

62188815
>>62188279
It’s funny how you mix Ukraine with some jewish conspiracy.

62188832
>>62188796
No, communism is evil and everyone who promotes communism is a soulless monster.

62188926
>>62188815
>>62188832
Israeli IP

62188963
you laughed at le trade meme
hahhahahah
I can work anywhere I want, more jobs then I can shake a stick at, getting phone calls about asking if Im available for dispatch, sorry currently employed!

62190507
>>62185702
That all just sounds like bullshit

>>62187055
Huh? If the count was based on people who want a job why are you talking about slavery

62190516
>>62185827
>>62188258
Those are just an obnoxious type of ghost listing
https://www.fastcompany.com/91019872/employers-are-intentionally-leaving-job-openings-unfilled-heres-why

62190529
capitalism doesn't work
king now
kill jew
sell orc inc mik wop feminists
force abourt preg not want
free slave girls n rooms for white male engineer, everyone else 0 money
red lights gone instead put road circle small
highway have middle u turn lanes, no overpass
flibe.com free power
greenarrays.com replaces computing university school lawyer movies games net etc.
more barges n canals
monorails
trains
etc
dymaxion car burning hydrogen in stirling engine exhaust water
dam huge waterway for hydroelectric
100% white west playground :)
king all the way

62192053
>>62188815
kys shill-rat.
>>62188832
agreed, thats why i hate kikes, they invented communism in their kike-think-tanks, weaponised it and unleashed it on Russia+china, and the world. Kikes are either directly, or indirectly, behind 95% of all human suffering for the last ~200 years.

62194013
>>62184286
Everyone is talking about that - on plebbit and normie sites. This board is for retards with $3000 saved to gamble it on shitcoins dreaming of becoming a millionaire.

62194027
>>62185045
>network engineer
>CompTIA
Doubt. Even a CCNA won't get you a job.
CompTIA is basically worthless.

62194055
>>62184286
>Ive been working for 10 years

Woah, woah, woah Hold up there gramps.

I haven't seen attack ships on fire off the shoulder of Orion, but I am getting video interviews at least. The problem is usually the company will cuck out at the last minute and cancel the req before I get a chance to start. I've been between jobs now for 8 months, almost 10% of your career, and it happens quite a bit. I suggest you pick up a book. Maybe pass the 3 CFA exams. Until everyone learns to stop being faggots about AI, we're in for a bumpy ride because galaxy brains like yourself think you can automate and forget it. Some businesses will have to get fucked up first THEN they can start hiring humans again

62194083
>>62188643
this is serious

>>62188963
you'll be poorer than you ever imagined soon

>>62190529
this. I would like to subscribe thank you

62194913
>>62194027
even tho the faggot you replied to was replying to me, I believe his story. I joined a contractor IT job and they had many clients whom I got to interact with. Every single one of them liked me and boasted about the work i did. I reached out to the one i liked most when I was ready to rejoin employment after a year break and they swooped me up with no interview or credential checking. I do not have any certs, dropped out of college since it was a meme and a scam and learned everything through projects I was doing based from my hobbies (gaming).
>certs, degrees, etc are useless in clown world
>proof of work always works, like BTC if your proof of work is amazing YOU WILL BE SOUGHT OUT
>after a year of interacting with AIs, i asked them to give me an IQ estimate based upon our interactions and all of them told me 135+
While you are worrying about wasting time "meeting" their requirements for work, employers are wasting time meeting my requirements to work for them. You and I are not the same

62197152
>>62184413
Try saying that in public to 1/4 of the population and see what happens.

62200034
>>62184286
there's a looooot of boomers still in the workforce, and the news now says they have more wealth than all other generations combined.

62200057
>>62185888
I decided I wanted to go to law school and then was brutally denied with a 167 while negresses who complied they only had a 151 were accepted. Not to good schools, mind you, but seeing some 30yo fat black chick making 20k a month in DC and complaining she can't make ends meet and finding out she only got a 155 on the LSAT but went to Harvard Law is just a massive FUCK you.

62200063
>>62186171
ironic since Shrub is the reason things got so bad.

>>62186790
Capitalism and eugenics are inherently at odds, social darwinism means I'm smart enough to bash you in with a rock while you cry as I execute your kids gang style. Capitalism is your daddy got you a nice job and you think you're a tough guy. These are at opposite ends of the value spectrum.

62200068
>>62194913
networking doesn't matter when you get your head bashed in with a rock.

62200076
>>62200034
there's a 75yo at the local mail room who glares at me when I come in, but is like sugar for every 20-30yo woman. He's a lazy fuck and a creep. These guys are one bad day from keeling over and they're still competing with us for women, our fathers/grandfathers, like it's 1975. I hate them so bad.

62200088
>>62200057
Fuck, really? What was your GPA?

62200155
>>62197152
Most people have a job NEETcel.

62200169
>>62200155
You do know that they've been consistently revising those numbers way down right? I have a job currently myself, but I know Jerome Powell himself was admitting that the job market is probably a lot worse than what it has looked like on the surface in the last couple years.

62200185
>>62184286
>Every job is fake, they will interview for 3 or 4 rounds and still repost the job next week, after ghosting people of course
I've been saying this before but this is the biggest class action law suit in American history waiting to happen. the sheer premeditated and coldhearted and quite honestly treasonous fraud perpetrated on the American labor force is monstrous in size and weight. the amount of time, energy, labor, and national resources wasted by corporate America is of such magnitude it's almost incomprehensible yet it still pales in comparison to the psychological and emotional damages and torture caused by callous greedy corporate monsters to the average American. it's not exaggeration to call the actions of corporations writing out fake job positions never to be filled as plainly one thing, and one thing only: job terrorism. the impact is not imagined, it is too real: innocent, hardworking Americans armed with nothing but a dream of a better life and the pursuit of happiness have committed suicide because of the irresponsible behavior of corporations. corporate America is guilty, guilty of treason, guilty of murder, guilty of the most heinous crimes in American history: any American citizen who has ever been invited to a ghost job interview is according to my estimations owed anywhere between $1-5 million dollars in damages paid. I'm not a lawyer nor is this financial advice nor should anything I write or say ever be taken seriously especially not in this ironic anime board but all I have to say is God Bless America and damn those evil ghost jobs to hell!

62200599
>>62185125
>>62185702
>>62186168
>>62190507
Trump did that

item.title: Is XRP the most underrated crypto in existence? — 15 replies — 34.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Is XRP the most underrated crypto in existence?

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-05-07 07:06 UTC

OP

Is XRP the most underrated crypto in existence?

The chart says we’re about to prove all the haters wrong.

Double digits this run.

Phoenix rising.

XRP Army - what are you seeing?

Early replies (first 3)

62195906
How does 0.05000000000000000 United states dollars per XRP sound?

62195943
I unironically thing you guys will go back to 2.5+ but i'm not sure yet how xrp will actually be used by the network
I know its supposed to be a bridgecurrency, but wouldnt it trend to zero because of its extremely high velocity usecase? I can see them doing some buyback mechanism once ripple gets enough stablecoin volume on their rlusd.

62195951
>>62195943
XRP can go to $589 because all the money in the world will be on XRP. It is gonna be the new world reserve currency.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62195978
>>62195951
Yes but how does that work? I've been reading the assumption is basically, that big financial entities, banks etc will hold huge amounts of xrp to provide liqudity for the instant swap, but doesnt the ondemand liquidity feature by ripple negate that? The previous scenario is basicallly the dollar isnt it? I can see the US wanting to onboard the whole world into crypto to keep their reserve currency status so maybe thats their way of doing it, but it sounds bonkers for the US to choose a crypto instead of making one

62195981
>>62195978
DYOR bro

62196180
>>62195890

62196194
>>62195890

62196296

62196676

item.title: The New AI Paradigm — 23 replies — 31.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
The New AI Paradigm

Open thread • Replies: 23 • Updated: 2026-05-07 06:49 UTC

OP

It's an undeniable fact that we have entered into a new paradigm of infinite wealth creation and prosperity, thanks to Agentic AI. Worldwide UBI will be implemented by giving everyone a small share of AI, quantum computing, and humanoid stocks, so that everyone can become millionaires thanks to this technological revolution and not have to work anymore. The GDP will increase by quadrillions of dollars thanks to AGI taking over the stock market, of which we are only now starting to see the beginning of. This is what Trump was talking about when he said we would be living in a new golden age. We're all going to be rich.

Early replies (first 3)

62194660
>>62194649
sndk trades at 12x forward earnings. its cheaper than PG

62194663
>>62194649
Intel reaches 200% of the share price it had about 6 years ago.

Back then it had about $25B of operating income. Its almost negative now.

Oh and there's 20% more shares outstanding vs 6 years ago.

The people who decided that today is the day they should go ahead and buy chip stocks are the guys who just made their 1999 money back from Cisco and Intel.

What a meme market. Closed all my chip holdings today

62194664
it's over

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62194670
>>62194663
ok boomer

62194674
>>62194663
I didn’t know such wise anons were in here

62194675
>>62194670
I'm 25, but I've been investing since 14. Guess that makes me a boomer here.

62194747
>>62194649
lol normies still think people are getting ubi. because how else would 8 billion humans survive right? they cant just let 8 billion humans starve right? thats like, not gonna happen right?

62194776
>>62194649
Truth OP

62194780
>>62194674
He's wrong, the market/chips like Intel and AMD and SNDK will all go another 20% before they see pullback.

62194781
>>62194663
Also this market can't crash because too much is invested in AI and the boomer portfolios need to stay up. They will turn the dollar to the peso before the market crashes

62194787
>>62194776

62194788

62194815
>>62194649

We WILL see them SHARE the wealth with everyone. It WILL be a new utopia!
AI is the SAVIOR!

You people don't actually believe this right?

62194826
>>62194660

62194908
>>62194649

>>62194781
I'm sure goldchads will appreciate it, stocklets on the other hand...

>>62194815

62195559
>>62194649

62195571
>>62194675

62195597
>>62195559
AI has saved billions of dollars for multiple companies. Microsoft uses it to reduce coding times by 85%. Amazon uses it for logistics. JP Morgan using it for fraud detection. Walmart uses it for supply chain optimization.
AI isn’t going anywhere.

62195677
>>62195597
none of this matters, unless FED prints 100 trillion usd in next 2 years, this market is going down

62199316
>>62194663
I've been in it 5 years so I rode it all the way down and now watch in amazement as it goes up 15% in a day and then another 5 day after day, doubled in a month

62199321

item.title: Remember, trades are zero sum. BEST CASE, half of you win and half of you lose. But in reality you're trading against pe… — 3 replies — 2.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Remember, trades are zero sum. BEST CASE, half of you win and half of you lose. But in reality you're trading against pe…

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-05-07 06:08 UTC

OP

Remember, trades are zero sum. BEST CASE, half of you win and half of you lose. But in reality you're trading against people who are vastly more informed than you, so almost all of you will lose.

Early replies (first 3)

62199432
I only trade fiat for bitcoin and win every time

62199448
Trading is death

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lVi7yr9ifbo

62200536
>>62199418
That's only true if everything kept regressing to the mean and the economy stayed flat.
Turns out economies grow (people, education, productivity, resources discovered and mined). That's why you can buy MSCI World and beat inflation.
So it turns out only idiots lose money. They underperform indices so I can overperform them.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

Bitcoin until 120k

62195300
you can't time the market I thought like >>62195293
last time, bitcoin to 70k and sell half and go into alts and then 2021 alts just fucking died for a year.

The alts that pumped are things that haven't gone parabolic yet, or big projects like Solana with glowie money attached to them. Ones like Link are not going to 1000 regardless of cope.

/biz/ will pretty much only give you bad info too. I've found maybe 3 coins here that were Guaranteed returns, everything else I had to research myself. In fact I remember last year posting proof that CRCL stock was going to 10x on IPO and got XRP schizos fudding me out of taking a life changing position.

I actually hate the fuck out of baggies.

item.title: You faggots are always moaning there's no more insider info on this board so here's one for you. — 1 replies — 4.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
You faggots are always moaning there's no more insider info on this board so here's one for you.

Open thread • Replies: 1 • Updated: 2026-05-07 07:27 UTC

OP

You faggots are always moaning there's no more insider info on this board so here's one for you. Very small company, listed on the Amsterdam stock exchange. So insignificant the news haven't picked up on it yet.

They had a massive database fuckup where saved locations and routes were deleted.
The issue is impacting both individual users and fleet operators. Sounds insignificant, but these are extremely important for truck drivers and logistics, especially because European roads are far less suitable for heavy vehicles than North American ones, so all truckers rely heavily on pre-saved routes and locations rather than inputting addresses to reach their destination without getting stuck in a narrow village street or striking a low bridge.

Check TomTom's social media and you will see how big this is in the sector. TomTom has been completely silent about the blackout so far. They are about to lose a large chunk of their paid users and corporate customers.
There are talks of entire freight routes being put on hold while transport managers scramble to sign up to a different provider.

I don't know how to profit from this but I'm sure some of you spergs will. TomTom is about to go down BIGLY.

And if you want to stretch this into a happening, apparently the blackout was a result of some AWS bug/error but it's still unknown if Amazon themselves will be impacted (probably not, if I could bet I'd bet on it being some dumb pajeet hired by TomTom who doesn't know how to work with AWS.)

You're welcome.
